title: The Botanist
synopsis:
Set in a remote village in Xinjiang, China, THE BOTANIST follows a young Kazakh boy named Arsin, who finds solace in the company of plants. He soon meets Meiyu, a spirited Han girl whose unpredictable nature reminds him of a rare, otherworldly plant. As their friendship blossoms, it deepens into a delicate, dreamlike allegory that blurs the lines between reality and the enchanting world of botany.

 

Encapsulating the fantasy and agony of growing up, Jing delivers a mesmerizing visual poetry to his homeland. Winner of the Grand Prix of the Generation Kplus International Jury at Berlinale 2025.

synopsis_lang.en:
Set in a remote village in Xinjiang, China, THE BOTANIST follows a young Kazakh boy named Arsin, who finds solace in the company of plants. He soon meets Meiyu, a spirited Han girl whose unpredictable nature reminds him of a rare, otherworldly plant. As their friendship blossoms, it deepens into a delicate, dreamlike allegory that blurs the lines between reality and the enchanting world of botany.

 

Encapsulating the fantasy and agony of growing up, Jing delivers a mesmerizing visual poetry to his homeland. Winner of the Grand Prix of the Generation Kplus International Jury at Berlinale 2025.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk:
在新疆一個偏遠的村莊，草原無限延伸，溪水潺潺長流，男孩阿爾辛過著牧羊的生活，與植物為伴。一天，一名漢族女孩出現在男孩面前，狹小的植物世界開始蓬勃生長。正當男孩以為自己珍藏的植物手帳終有分享對象時，女孩卻要返回上海——4792公里外的地方。世上一些人和事，能否像植物標本一樣永遠珍藏在身旁？

 

新疆導演景一首部長片即勇奪柏林影展新生代Kplus單元國際評審團最佳電影，以細膩鏡頭捕捉男孩成長的幻與痛，旖旎的畫面猶如動態風物詩般引人入勝。

cast_lang.zh_hk: 葉斯力·加和斯力克、任紫晗

subtitle: Chinese,English
